name: player_rush_yards_after_contact_per_attempt_from_plays year_offset range
expected_query: with "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2018,2019,2020,2021]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years WHERE player.pos IN ('WR')), "t8ef9ac713e2f71ff66ef61764f915185" as (select "pg"."pid", ROUND((1.5 * COUNT(CASE WHEN nfl_plays.trg_pid = pg.pid THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN trg_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)) + (0.7 * SUM(CASE WHEN nfl_plays.trg_pid = pg.pid THEN nfl_plays.dot ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(nfl_plays.dot), 0)), 4) as weighted_opp_rating_from_plays, "nfl_plays"."year" from "nfl_plays" inner join "player_gamelogs" as "pg" on "nfl_plays"."esbid" = "pg"."esbid" and "nfl_plays"."off" = "pg"."tm" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and ("trg_pid" is not null) and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2018, 2019, 2020, 2021) and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') group by "pg"."pid", "nfl_plays"."year"), "t103a818b58433e75696c99e347338337" as (select "pg"."pid", COUNT(CASE WHEN nfl_plays.trg_pid = pg.pid THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) as player_targets, SUM(CASE WHEN trg_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as team_targets, SUM(CASE WHEN nfl_plays.trg_pid = pg.pid THEN nfl_plays.dot ELSE 0 END) as player_air_yards, SUM(nfl_plays.dot) as team_air_yards, "nfl_plays"."year" from "nfl_plays" inner join "player_gamelogs" as "pg" on "nfl_plays"."esbid" = "pg"."esbid" and "nfl_plays"."off" = "pg"."tm" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and ("trg_pid" is not null) and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2018, 2019, 2020, 2021, 2022, 2023, 2024) and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') group by "pg"."pid", "nfl_plays"."year") select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, "t8ef9ac713e2f71ff66ef61764f915185"."weighted_opp_rating_from_plays" AS "weighted_opp_rating_from_plays_0", (SELECT ROUND((1.5 * SUM(t103a818b58433e75696c99e347338337.player_targets) / NULLIF(SUM(t103a818b58433e75696c99e347338337.team_targets), 0)) + (0.7 * SUM(t103a818b58433e75696c99e347338337.player_air_yards) / NULLIF(SUM(t103a818b58433e75696c99e347338337.team_air_yards), 0)), 4) FROM t103a818b58433e75696c99e347338337 WHERE t103a818b58433e75696c99e347338337.pid = player.pid AND t103a818b58433e75696c99e347338337.year BETWEEN player_years.year + 1 AND player_years.year + 3) AS "weighted_opp_rating_from_plays_1", "player_years"."year", "player"."pos" from "player" inner join "player_years" on "player_years"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "t8ef9ac713e2f71ff66ef61764f915185" on "t8ef9ac713e2f71ff66ef61764f915185"."pid" = "player"."pid" and t8ef9ac713e2f71ff66ef61764f915185.year = player_years.year and t8ef9ac713e2f71ff66ef61764f915185.year IN (2018,2019,2020,2021) where player.pos IN ('WR') group by player.fname, player.lname, "t8ef9ac713e2f71ff66ef61764f915185"."weighted_opp_rating_from_plays", "player_years"."year", "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 4 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
